run.description: Run FastQC quality control analysis on one or more sequence files

positional_args.name: input
positional_args.description: Input file(s): FASTQ, BAM, or SAM format (space-separated for multiple files)

--threads.description: Number of files to process in parallel

--format.description: Force file format: bam, sam, fastq, fastq_illumina, casava

--extract.description: Extract the zip file after creating it

--noextract.description: Do not extract the zip file

--adapters.description: Path to a file containing adapter sequences

--contaminants.description: Path to a file of contaminant sequences

--limits.description: Path to a file of limits for quality modules

--min-length.description: Discard reads shorter than this length
